description: 高確率予想（出力A）・マルチベット（出力B）記録
instructions_for_claude: スクリーニング完了後に 出力A → 出力B → このJSONに記録 → dashboard.html更新 の順で実行
出力A: L1~L4で確実視できる試合のみ。少しでも迷いがある場合は含めない
出力B: 出力Aが2件以上の場合のみ。全組み合わせのうちEV+のものを上位5パターン出力
結果確定後は各エントリの result を hit/miss に更新する
multi_odds = 各オッズの積 / total_win_prob = 各勝率の積 / multi_ev = (total_win_prob × multi_odds) - 1

output_a.tournament: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix Stuttgart R2
output_a.reason: WTA #1 vs Qualifier. cElo差400pt超。Clay最強格。推定勝率92%。EVはマイナスだが予測確実性は最高位。
ATP #3 Clay specialist vs 世界66位。cElo差300pt超。Barcelona地元。推定勝率88%。
output_a.actual: Alcaraz withdrew (wrist injury). Machac advanced via WO.

output_a.reason: Renegades 3-0 vs Aviators 0-3。DIFF/G差。Austin Reed QB確認済。ホーム優位+4%。Week4閾値80%超。

Houston QB Tagovailoa 171yd 7-45 blowout loss W3 (unstable QB situation)。Louisville QB Bean W3 352yd 3TD (Houston戦で好パフォーマンス)。PD/G: Louisville -4.7/G vs Houston -18.3/G (Houston W3 45-7大敗でPD悪化)。L1 diff 13.6 > threshold 4。conf 82% > Week4 threshold 80%。EV+35.3%。

output_a.tournament: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix Stuttgart R2
output_a.reason: WTA #3 vs 世界10位前後。Gauff Clay成績良好。推定勝率81%。EVマイナスだが予測確実性高い。
cElo差271pt（Musetti ~2017 vs Moutet ~1746）。基礎確率84%→傷病歴補正-5%(AO adductor+Miami arm, R013)→conf 78%。EV+6.9%。両閾値クリア。

output_a.tournament: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix Stuttgart R2
output_a.reason: cElo差300pt（Paolini 1916 vs Sonmez 1616）。推定勝率78%。EV+5.4%。両閾値クリア。

sessions.upset_pick_note: All 11 UPSET_PICK_CHECK candidates failed UF>=3 + div>=15pp threshold after walkthrough. Notable: COL-LAK G2 (1.35 vs 3.15, ~42pp div) but COL home + Wedgewood hot + G1 won reduces UF to 2 (LAK home-desperation, COL G1 complacency risk). Below threshold.
sessions.output_b_note: All 18 output-A candidates have margin-adjusted EV ≈ -5% individually. Multi combos computed from these yield EV = 0.95^n - 1, always negative. No EV+ multi available at Session_45 market conditions.

go_candidates_deep_dive.match: Cleveland Cavaliers vs Toronto Raptors NBA PO G1
go_candidates_deep_dive.result_status: CONFIRMED HIT 4/18 (Cleveland 126-113) - market fav was right, extracted via WebSearch
go_candidates_deep_dive.note: G1は4/18完了・fav HIT。市場1.27 @ win → 0.27u gain had GO been taken. ただしNBA PO全般L1(NRtg)でCleveland差優位。次G2オッズ1.27も GOするかL1深掘り要。時間制約で本session省略

go_candidates_deep_dive.match: Crusaders vs NSW Waratahs Super Rugby
go_candidates_deep_dive.note: Crusaders 1.15 (83%) - Super Rugby home playoff 優位。L1 PD/G差 確認でGO昇格候補だが本session 時間制約。

go_candidates_deep_dive.match: NBA San Antonio Spurs vs Portland Blazers G2
go_candidates_deep_dive.note: G1 PA017 pending - G2 1.12 は G1結果次第。Wembanyama ACTIVE継続なら 出力A級。

insights_from_session_45: 市場効率性により margin-adj proxy では EV+ がほぼ出ない。L1 (cElo/NRtg/xGF%/PD/G) 深掘りが GO生成の唯一の経路。
Session_30-43 で GO が14セッション実質ゼロだった構造原因判明。時間制約下で L1深掘りが省略 → 市場ベース判定 → 全試合 EV負。
出力A候補18件 = Session_30-43で見逃されていた『確実視できるが EV負』の試合。これが腑に落ちなかった真の原因。
UPSET_PICK は Session_45 時点で 0件発動 (条件厳格)。GEN005 table の UF>=3 + div>=15pp を満たす試合は実際には稀。
運用改善候補: (1) GO_CANDIDATE 19件のうち L1深掘りで市場乖離 3件見つければ EV+マルチ可能。(2) UF因子チェックリストを機械的に walkthrough する手順を記録。

session_45_g1_summary.note: NBA G1 3 output-A candidates all HIT. Market-fav at conf>=85% validated.

findings.L1_data: Panthers 5-0 start, +150 PD through 5 rounds (+30/G early). Later regression (R6 loss to Bulldogs 32-16). Knights previously wooden spoon, now improved w/ Dylan Brown + Sandon Smith. R9 timing: Panthers revival stage.
findings.L1_verdict: Panthers fav correct. PD/G diff still substantial. Own conf estimate 79-82% vs market 79%. Marginal edge < 5pp. Not GO trigger threshold.

findings.match: Super Rugby Crusaders vs Waratahs (Crusaders 1.15 vs 4.8)
findings.L1_data: Crusaders 9M 4-5 21pts 6th PD +39 (+4.3/G). Waratahs form poor (specific data not obtained).
findings.L1_verdict: Crusaders home playoff-desperate + Waratahs struggling. PD/G diff ~7pt+ likely. L1 PASS threshold (7pt for Super Rugby). Conf 83-85%. Very close to market @83%. Marginal.

findings.L1_data: Toulouse 1st 76pts, Clermont 6th 57pts after 21 matches. 19-point gap = dominant lead.
findings.L1_verdict: Already output_A candidate @93% conf. L1 confirms. No GO promotion needed (EV structural negative).

findings.match: Top14 Racing 92 vs US Montalbanaise (Racing 1.00 vs 12)
findings.L1_data: Racing 7th 55pts, US Montalbanaise likely last in standings.
findings.L1_verdict: OUTPUT_A confirmed @95% conf. No edge over market.

go_candidate_L1_deep_dive.structural_conclusion: L1 data confirms market positioning. No GO_CANDIDATE L1 promotion achieved in Session_45. Next sessions need L2-L4 depth (injuries, form momentum, H2H, coaching, rest) for independent conf outside market.
go_candidate_L1_deep_dive.unchanged_issue: Market efficiency at major sports = L1 alone rarely beats bookmaker. GO generation requires multi-layer depth or rare market-mispricing events.

results.match: NHL COL-LAK G2 (4/22 COL home, Avalanche 1.35 vs Kings 3.15)

uf_walkthrough.UF01: COL home advantage. LAK must-win away. Negates upset.
uf_walkthrough.UF02: LAK Kopitar veteran leadership + down 0-1 desperation (partial)
uf_walkthrough.UF06: COL complacency risk after G1 win. Partial.
uf_walkthrough.UFH04: LAK G1 shots 25 vs 24 - near parity; not dominantly outplayed

results.verdict: UF2 + 42pp - UPSET_PICK NOT met (UF<3). COL home + Wedgewood form + G1 lead all favor COL. Skip.

results.match: NRL Manly vs Parramatta (Manly 1.30 vs Eels 3.20)
results.verdict: UF1 + 46pp - not met. Manly strong home fav.

results.matches_batch: 9 WTA Madrid Q + Oeiras + ATP Challenger matches
results.batch_verdict: All dog-side unknown players (Q/futures level). UF factor assessment requires player-level data not obtained in time-budget. Conservative verdict: UPSET_PICK NOT applicable for Q-round players; insufficient information.

upset_pick_uf_deep_dive.overall_verdict: 0/11 triggered UPSET_PICK. UF factor walkthrough confirms Session_45 tentative read. UPSET_PICK extremely rare under strict UF>=3+div>=15pp rule.
upset_pick_uf_deep_dive.rule_observation: UPSET_PICK threshold (UF>=3+div>=15pp) may be too strict. Future rule review: consider loosening to UF>=2+div>=20pp for tier-adjusted stake (0.5u) UPSET_PICK-Lite category.

sessions.output_b_revision_note: Session_45 初版は『EV+組み合わせなし』のみ記録だったが、ユーザー指摘を受けて『総合勝率順/EV最大順の各TOP5』を参考情報として追記。EV-だが高確率マルチとしての情報価値を担保。CLAUDE.md 仕様の誤解釈（EV+のみ表示→EV-でも上位列挙）を訂正。

sessions.session_summary: Session_47: 結果確認専念。NHL/NBA PO R1 G1 全16試合 + Play-in 2件 を一次ソース2つ以上 (ESPN/NHL.com/NBA.com/CBS) で確認し records に反映。特に LAL-HOU は KD欠場という新規 factor で A029 登録・P024 ルール候補発足。A026/A027/A028 の factor_notes を深掘り強化し rule_linked 付与完了 (PA055 DONE)。予測精度: NHL 62.5% / NBA 75%. bet_performance 影響なし (全 SKIP/CAUTION no-bet、SAS HIT +0.18u は Session_46 で計上済)。
